data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the exploratory step.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of using an international card with currency conversion, but the evidence provided does not include any details about currency conversion rates or mechanisms. The only currency mentioned is USD, and there is no indication of how the system handles currency conversion or what the expected behavior should be. This lack of information leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of the scenario.
gaps: No evidence of currency conversion rates or snapshots during checkout.
